title: Audit apps/aiyou_stack/ (7,565 tracked files, 4.1 GiB)
resolution: Removed 1,977 data artifacts (1,956 LanceDB + 21 .bak). Tracked files: 7,565→5,588 (26% reduction). Gitignore rules added. Commit 0f765efa9.

title: Bootstrap CI Level 3 — bazel test //apps/counselconduit/...
resolution: 12 BUILD.bazel files covering all code sub-packages: root, agents, api, api/middleware, middleware, models, sandbox, services, shield (Go), tests, tools, ui. 13 py_test + 1 go_test targets. Non-code dirs (deploy, docs, monitoring, public, spec, static, src) correctly excluded.

title: Execute 60.3 GiB disk recovery
resolution: Purged archive/ (26G), .gitnexus/ (800M), .mypy_cache/ (488M). Total reclaimed: 27.3 GiB. src/.mypy_cache already removed earlier. All dirs confirmed absent post-cleanup.

title: AG-UI cockpit frontend assembly
description: Assemble AG-UI generative cockpit using existing agui-generative-ui and ag-ui-frontend-protocol skills.

title: Evaluate Repowise vs GitNexus capabilities
description: Determine if Repowise offers value beyond GitNexus for codebase intelligence.

title: Dagger/Temporal execution layer adoption
description: Current scripts suffice. Dagger is future-state per MONOREPO_OS.md.

title: SCIP/Zoekt index deployment
description: GitNexus + ripgrep is current fallback. SCIP/Zoekt are optional performance indexes.

title: OpenFGA integration for ToolGateway
description: YAML contracts are sufficient for current agent count.

title: Fix LFS ↔ pre-commit hook conflict
resolution: LFS hooks neutralized, filter config removed. 0 LFS files tracked.

title: Deploy KovelAI landing page to Firebase Hosting
resolution: Deployed to kovelai.web.app. 69 files. Lighthouse: A96/BP92/SEO100. Commit aa1eb6b42.

title: Audit truth_surfaces.yaml against live GCP state
resolution: Verified: shadowtag-omega-v4 ACTIVE, org 276384896282, Firestore rules zero-trust with firm isolation, Storage deny-all, firebase.json 4 hosting targets (kovelai, shadowtagai, default-site, uphillsnowball), auth founder@shadowtagai.com. All truth surfaces aligned.

title: Run Betterleaks scan on new 40 committed files
resolution: Betterleaks pre-commit gate passed on aa1eb6b42. 0 secrets found. DLP circuit breaker paths fixed.

title: Fix biome pre-commit + DLP circuit breaker path mismatches
resolution: Biome exclude updated for IDE dotfiles. DLP ALLOWED_FILES paths corrected from google- prefix to actual skill dirs. Committed in aa1eb6b42.

title: Design Gate — design.md lint + token export for KovelAI
description: Run @google/design.md lint on KovelAI design system. Export Tailwind theme + W3C DTCG tokens. Enforce WCAG contrast. Skill: designmd-stitch-visual-mastery.

title: Pyrefly CI gate — Python type-safety pre-commit
description: Evaluate pyrefly as ruff companion for Python type checking in pre-commit. Do not replace mypy yet — benchmark first.

title: Taste Validation gate — frontend visual quality scoring
description: Implement automated taste scoring using design-taste-frontend skill. Score color harmony, typography, spacing, motion. Gate: score >= 80/100 for production deploy.

title: Implement Firebase Tool Bridge — bridge.py dispatch core
resolution: bridge.py implemented: 6-step lifecycle (validate→gate→hooks→execute→evidence→return), ConfirmationProvider gate, batch dispatch, hook system. 23/23 tests. Commit f2c9dc8e0 pushed to origin.

title: RISK: repo-mass-reduction skill contains destructive operations
description: Skill contains git reset --hard, git push --force, and rm -rf. These violate RULE_00 (Immutable Infrastructure). Action: Add ToolGateway contract gating, require STATE B for execution, add archive-first fallback for rm operations. Triage source: .reports/skills/unsafe_findings.md

title: RISK: yolo-mode-operator skill enables unrestricted agent execution
description: Skill contains agentYoloMode flag and rm -rf operations. YOLO mode must inherit ToolGateway limits and destructive ops must be gated. Action: Ensure ToolGateway contracts override YOLO permissions for destructive operations. Double-gate rm -rf behind both STATE B and ConfirmationProvider.

title: Deploy SkillOps CI gate as PR workflow
resolution: Created .github/workflows/skillops-audit.yml. Runs skills-audit.sh --check-overlap --json on PRs touching .agents/skills/ or skills/. Threshold: 50 findings. Posts PR comment with audit results. Upload artifact for 30-day retention.

title: v1.8 SkillOps hardening triage milestone
resolution: Triaged all 44 findings: 12 ACTUAL RISK (27%), 12 MODERATE (27%), 20 DOC REFERENCE (45%). Top risks: repo-mass-reduction (3 patterns), yolo-mode-operator (2 patterns). CI gate deployed. Clone Yard pulled agent_protocols. Heartbeat wired. Memory atom created.

title: RESOLVED: repo-mass-reduction skill gated via ToolGateway
description: ToolGateway contract skills.repo_mass_reduction.yaml enforces STATE B for git reset --hard, git push --force, rm -rf. GUARDRAIL annotations added to all moderate-risk skills. Verified via skills-audit.sh --check-overlap --json.

title: RESOLVED: yolo-mode-operator skill gated via ToolGateway
description: ToolGateway contract skills.yolo_mode_operator.yaml enforces STATE B for rm -rf operations. YOLO mode inherits ToolGateway limits. Double-gated behind STATE B + ConfirmationProvider. Verified.

title: RESOLVED: Replace print() with structured logging in production scripts
resolution: Replaced all print() calls with logging module in scripts/pr_creator.py (11 occurrences) and scripts/prune_gca_chat_threads.py (27 occurrences). Module-level loggers + basicConfig for CLI entry points. Ruff clean. 0 print() remaining.

title: RESOLVED: expert-agent-builder dedup stub fixed
resolution: Global active copy at ~/.gemini/antigravity/skills/expert-agent-builder/SKILL.md replaced with redirect stub pointing to canonical .agents/skills/expert-agent-builder/SKILL.md (149 lines). Stale 9-line version removed.

title: CI unsafe threshold tightened to 15
resolution: Verified .github/workflows/skillops-audit.yml UNSAFE_THRESHOLD=15. Aligned with v2.0 hardening milestone.

title: RESOLVED: Design Gate — KovelAI DESIGN.md lint + token export
resolution: WCAG AA contrast violation fixed (on-primary #FFFFFF→#1A1030, 5.02:1 ratio). Exported W3C DTCG tokens.json (15KB) and tailwind-theme.js (4.8KB) to apps/kovelai/.design-tokens/. Design system validated.

title: RESOLVED: Pyrefly evaluation — Python type-safety gate
resolution: Pyrefly benchmarked at ~10x speed vs legacy. 5 type errors fixed via TypedDict in gca_autolint.py. Incremental adoption roadmap documented in .reports/pyrefly-evaluation.md. CI workflow deferred to next sprint.
